creator: jaco@teaser.fr
text:
Postfix ports don't install the rmail script provided with the sources in auxiliary/rmail. It's a problem when we are doing UUCP with NO_SENDMAIL in /etc/make.conf. I think it should be up to the MTA to provide a rmail replacement.

Fix: 

add the installation of auxiliary/rmail/rmail script when installing Postfix (perhaps with a message warning UUCP users about the existing but not up to date /bin/rmail they're using).
How-To-Repeat: make installworld doesn't build rmail when NO_SENDMAIL=true, even if NOUUCP is false. Doing so, UUCP is broken for receiving mail.
